research_question: Do liquid A-shares with the lowest prior-complete-month salience tendency earn positive cost-aware monthly active returns versus 510300.SH?
null_hypothesis: For each gated split, population mean monthly net active return of the frozen low-salience portfolio is less than or equal to zero.
economic_mechanism: Investors may overweight unusually salient daily returns, leaving stocks whose salient days were disproportionately positive temporarily overpriced; the frozen long-only test therefore selects the lowest salience-tendency stocks.

forbidden_repairs: change salience formula or reference return
add momentum, volatility, turnover, regime or quality filters
change portfolio count, timing, costs, splits, inference or gates

input_identity.snapshot_receipt_resolution: relative to the parent directory of the frozen database

universe.scope: SSE and SZSE domestic common A-shares on Main, STAR and ChiNext boards
universe.decision_state: listed, not delisted, non-ST, non-suspended, non-limit-up and non-limit-down at D
universe.complete_month_rule: Every eligible security must have a finite positive qfq_close for the accepted session preceding the month and every accepted session of the decision calendar month.
universe.missing_or_nonfinite_required_input: exclude before the cross-sectional reference and ranking; if fewer than 500 remain, invalidate the decision

feature_contract.signal_month: the complete calendar month ending on decision session D
feature_contract.daily_return: qfq_close[t] / qfq_close[t-1] - 1 for every accepted session t in the signal month
feature_contract.daily_reference_return: For each t, math.fsum of returns across the symbol-ascending complete eligible universe divided by its exact count.
feature_contract.salience_sigma: abs(r_i_t-r_bar_t)/(abs(r_i_t)+abs(r_bar_t)+0.1), evaluated in Python IEEE-754 binary64 after the frozen return and reference calculations
feature_contract.competition_rank: Within one stock-month, rank_t=1+count(sigma_u>sigma_t). Larger sigma is more salient; exact binary64 equality receives the same rank and creates competition-rank gaps; no tolerance, rounding, stable-sort position or symbol is used to break a sigma tie.
feature_contract.normalization: normalized_weight_t = raw_weight_t / (math.fsum(raw_weights)/N), so math.fsum(normalized_weights)/N equals one up to binary64 arithmetic
feature_contract.ranking: salience_tendency ascending, then symbol ascending; no tolerance and no tie expansion

portfolio_and_execution.decision_frequency: last accepted session of each calendar month
portfolio_and_execution.benchmark: independently initialized investable 510300.SH with identical timing and costs
portfolio_and_execution.capacity: prior accepted session volume and amount caps, each 1 percent
portfolio_and_execution.blocked_entry: unfilled notional remains cash; no replacement
portfolio_and_execution.blocked_exit: retain and retry through the existing shared blocked-exit path
portfolio_and_execution.shared_semantics: reuse existing A-share 100-share lots, T+1, limit, suspension, commission, stamp-tax, corporate-action and cash accounting unchanged

costs.additional: existing 3 bps commission with CNY 5 minimum and dated statutory sell stamp tax

splits.access: closed until a later prospective phase

split_assignment: A monthly observation is retained only when entry and the next scheduled rebalance exit are inside the same split; crossing labels are purged and every split starts in cash.

inference.resampling: circular block bootstrap over chronological non-overlapping monthly active returns
inference.p_value: (1 + count(centered bootstrap mean >= observed uncentered mean)) / 10001
inference.lower_bound: observed mean minus the linearly interpolated 0.9833333333333333 quantile of centered bootstrap means
inference.annualized_net_return: product(1+r_t) ** (12/N) - 1 for complete chronologically aligned monthly returns

gates_per_gated_split: zero invalid decisions, missing marks and accounting failures
mean monthly net active return is positive
one-sided Bonferroni p-value is at or below 0.016666666666666666
Bonferroni lower confidence bound is positive
strategy geometric annualized net return exceeds the identically aligned benchmark value
historical_pass: LOW_ST_MONTHLY passes all six gates in both validation and retrospective holdout.
prospective_pass: The unchanged historically passing variant later passes all six gates in prospective forward.

outcome_free_preflight.pass_rule: Every historical decision has at least 500 complete eligible securities and at least 15 finite ST candidates; all selected D+1 execution panels are complete; benchmark initial fill is true; unexpected exceptions are zero.
outcome_free_preflight.status_rule: PREFLIGHT_PASS only when every condition passes; STRUCTURAL_FAIL for any frozen eligible or candidate minimum failure; otherwise INPUT_BLOCKED.
outcome_free_preflight.prohibited_computation: No D+1-to-exit return, holding-period return, strategy NAV, benchmark NAV, active return, inference statistic or gate result.

stop_rules: Any frozen decision below 500 complete eligible or 15 finite ST candidates closes the family at preflight; do not relax thresholds.
Do not change feature, direction, delta, tie rule, portfolio, costs, timing, benchmark, splits, inference or gates after counts or outcomes are observed.
After accepted preflight PASS, execute exactly one historical run with a fresh Run ID.
Historical FAIL closes permanently without retuning, rescue filter, regime relabel or rerun.
Historical PASS remains non-candidate and stops for external review before any prospective phase.
No 2026-07-01-or-later observation may be accessed in this phase.
